module_info.docstring:
Token efficiency scorer for tldrs context packs.

Compares tldrs output against alternatives to measure actual token savings:
- Actual token count (via tiktoken)
- Comparison to raw file size
- Budget accuracy (estimated vs actual tokens)

Usage:
    # Score token metrics for a run
    ./scripts/score_tokens.py <RUN_ID>

    # With source file comparison
    ./scripts/score_tokens.py <RUN_ID> --source-file /path/to/file.py

Environment:
    INTERBENCH_HOME - interbench data directory

functions.name: get_run_context
functions.docstring: Get stdout content and metadata for a run.

functions.name: insert_score
functions.docstring: Insert a score via interbench CLI.

functions.name: parse_cache_hints
functions.docstring: Extract cache_hints JSON from tldrs cache-friendly output.

functions.name: parse_cache_stats
functions.docstring: Extract cache hit rate from tldrs STATS footer.

functions.name: parse_packed_json_aliases
functions.docstring: Extract alias map from packed-json output.
